ddls:
CREATE TABLE "material_master" (
  "MANDT" INTEGER /* Client number for the material */,
  "MATNR" TEXT /* Material number */,
  "MTART" TEXT /* Material type */,
  "MATKL" TEXT /* Material group */,
  "BISMT" TEXT /* Old material number */,
  "MEINS" TEXT /* Unit of measure */,
  "MATKL_DESC" TEXT /* Description of the material group */,
  "MTART_DESC" TEXT /* Description of the material type */,
  "WERKS" TEXT /* Plant where the material is managed */,
  "LGORT" TEXT /* Storage location within the plant */,
  "CHGDT" TEXT /* Date of the last change to the material master data */,
  "CRTDT" TEXT /* Date when the material was created in the system */,
  "CREATED_BY" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the material */,
  "CHANGED_BY" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last changed the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("MANDT", "MATNR"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_master_CHANGED_BY FOREIGN KEY ("CHANGED_BY") REFERENCES users ("USER_ID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_master_CREATED_BY FOREIGN KEY ("CREATED_BY") REFERENCES users ("USER_ID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_master_MTART FOREIGN KEY ("MTART") REFERENCES material_types ("MTART"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_master_MATKL FOREIGN KEY ("MATKL") REFERENCES material_groups ("MATKL")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_types" (
  "MTART" TEXT /* Material type code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material type */,
  "IS_ACTIVE" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the material type is active */,
  "CRTDT" TEXT /* Date when the material type was created in the system */,
  "CHGDT" TEXT /* Date of the last change to the material type */,
  "CREATED_BY" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the material type */,
  "CHANGED_BY" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last changed the material type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("MTART"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_types_CHANGED_BY FOREIGN KEY ("CHANGED_BY") REFERENCES users ("USER_ID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_types_CREATED_BY FOREIGN KEY ("CREATED_BY") REFERENCES users ("USER_ID")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_groups" (
  "MATKL" TEXT /* Material group code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material group */,
  "IS_ACTIVE" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the material group is active */,
  "CRTDT" TEXT /* Date when the material group was created in the system */,
  "CHGDT" TEXT /* Date of the last change to the material group */,
  "CREATED_BY" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the material group */,
  "CHANGED_BY" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last changed the material group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("MATKL"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_groups_CREATED_BY FOREIGN KEY ("CREATED_BY") REFERENCES users ("USER_ID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_groups_CHANGED_BY FOREIGN KEY ("CHANGED_BY") REFERENCES users ("USER_ID")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "USER_ID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "USERNAME" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "FULL_NAME" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "EMAIL" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "ROLE" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "DEPARTMENT" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "IS_ACTIVE" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "CRTDT" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "CHGDT" TEXT /* Date of the last change to the user account */,
  "CREATED_BY" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the user account */,
  "CHANGED_BY" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last changed the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("USER_ID")
)
